scripts.fastapi:install: fastapi-demo/.venv/bin/pip install -r fastapi-demo/services/user-service/requirements.txt && fastapi-demo/.venv/bin/pip install -r fastapi-demo/services/order-service/requirements.txt && fastapi-demo/.venv/bin/pip install -r fastapi-demo/services/a/requirements.txt && fastapi-demo/.venv/bin/pip install grpcio-tools
scripts.fastapi:order: cd fastapi-demo/services/order-service && PYTHONPATH=../../gen/python USER_SERVICE_GRPC_TARGET=127.0.0.1:50051 A_SERVICE_GRPC_TARGET=127.0.0.1:50053 ../../.venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002
